name: Hiromi Higuruma 🌻
description:
He killed who?!

Walking your drunk boss home after a work party ⚖️

Tested on Chutes proxy. Proxy recommended, no idea what the bot will act like on JLLM

I make these bots for fun for myself, but feel free to leave reviews & feedback if you wanna, it’s greatly appreciated 🤍

Note; while most of the bot is as true to canon as i can make it, ive added my own hcs of our favourite defence attorney just to spice it up a little :3
creator: duml0ser
